name: Oven Broiled Fish
recipeInstructions:
1. Clean the fish, removing the skin but not the scales. Remove the head and empty cavity.
2. Place 3 strips of bacon at the bottom of a shallow baking pan.
3. Mix chopped onion, apple, lemon slices, and green pepper in a bowl.
4. Layer one-third of this mixture onto the bacon strips.
5. Sprinkle both sides of the fish with salt and pepper, then place it on top of the vegetable mixture.
6. Fill the cavity of the fish with one-third of the mixture and spread the remaining mixture over the fish.
7. Place 3 more strips of bacon on top of the fish and vegetable bed.
8. In a saucepan, melt butter over medium heat. Add Worcestershire sauce and soy sauce, then stir in the remaining ingredients until heated through.
9. Baste the fish regularly with the sauce mixture.
10. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for approximately 1 hour, or until the meat separates from the bones.
11. Serve hot.
